title: [CI:IMG] try adding tor and removing skopeo-containers
body:
Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

Trial run to check if `contrib/cirrus/packer/README.how-to-update-cirrus-vms` works.
